chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. S – 55 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on CMA No.185/2024 (Ex.A) 2. For hearing of main case 10.05.2024 Miss. Rabia Baloch, Advocate a/w Petitioner Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General Sindh Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, DPG for the State SIP Pir Bux Bhutto, IO Crime No.15/2024 of PS Dad Leghari, District Ghotki. >>>>>..<<<<< Learned Counsel for the petitioner does not press this petition, on the ground that alleged detenue has appeared before this Court in C.P No.D-352/2024 seeking quashment of FIR lodged by petitioner. In view of above, this petition, having served its purpose is dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. Judge ARBROHI
